rule.description: Workday authentication success event. User: $(dstuser) with source IP: $(srcip) and source device: $(Device_Type) at time: $(timestamp).
Workday authentication failed event. User: $(dstuser) with source IP: $(srcip) and source device: $(Device_Type) at time: $(timestamp).
Workday audit trail event. Task: $(action), modified by user: $(dstuser) at time: $(timestamp).
